---
title: "DVDS bounds for survival outcomes"
author: "Jean-Baptiste BAITAIRIAN"
date: "2026-03-02"
output: html_document
---

## Monte Carlo experiments

Run Monte Carlo experiments.

```{r}
source("src/mc_experiments.R")
```


## Plots

### Simulated data

Survival function

![Sensitivity analysis for the survival function among the treated](./figures/simul_surv_plot_treated_lee_dvds_estim_I_and_II_v1_v1.pdf)

![Sensitivity analysis for the survival function among the control](./figures/simul_surv_plot_control_lee_dvds_estim_I_and_II_v1_v1.pdf)

![Sensitivity analysis for the difference of survival functions](./figures/simul_diff_surv_plot_lee_dvds_estim_I_and_II_v1_v1.pdf)

RMST

![Sensitivity analysis for the RMST among the treated](./figures/simul_rmst_plot_treated_lee_dvds_estim_I_and_II_v2_v2.pdf)

![Sensitivity analysis for the RMST among the control](./figures/simul_rmst_plot_control_lee_dvds_estim_I_and_II_v2_v2.pdf)

![Sensitivity analysis for the difference in RMST](./figures/simul_diff_rmst_plot_lee_dvds_estim_I_and_II_v2_v2.pdf)


### Real data

Difference of survival functions

![Sensitivity analysis for the difference of survival functions with Gamma=1.15](./figures/rhc_diff_surv_plot_lee_dvds_estim_I_and_II_v3_v3.pdf)

![Sensitivity analysis for the difference of survival functions with Gamma=1.2](./figures/rhc_diff_surv_plot_lee_dvds_estim_I_and_II_v4_v4.pdf)

![Sensitivity analysis for the difference of survival functions with Gamma=1.5](./figures/rhc_diff_surv_plot_lee_dvds_estim_I_and_II_v5_v5.pdf)


Difference in RMST

![Sensitivity analysis for the difference in RMST with Gamma=1.15](./figures/rhc_diff_rmst_plot_lee_dvds_estim_I_and_II_v6_v6.pdf)

![Sensitivity analysis for the difference in RMST with Gamma=1.2](./figures/rhc_diff_rmst_plot_lee_dvds_estim_I_and_II_v7_v7.pdf)

![Sensitivity analysis for the difference in RMST with Gamma=1.5](./figures/rhc_diff_rmst_plot_lee_dvds_estim_I_and_II_v8_v8.pdf)
